contentPillars.name: SA Calorie Shockers
contentPillars.description: Reveal the actual calories in popular SA restaurant meals. The shock factor IS the hook.
examples: Your Nando's order is hiding THIS many calories
I tracked every calorie at Steers Wacky Wednesday
Woolworths 'healthy' meals that are actually 800+ calories
Kauai smoothie vs Steers milkshake - which has more calories?

contentPillars.name: 2000 Cal Challenge
contentPillars.description: What 2,000 calories looks like at different SA restaurants/situations
examples: What 2,000 calories looks like at Nando's
What 2,000 calories looks like at a braai
What 2,000 calories looks like if you only ate biltong
What 2,000 calories looks like at Woolworths vs Checkers

contentPillars.name: WhatsApp Demo
contentPillars.description: Screen recordings of FitSorted in action - show how easy it is
examples: I tracked my entire Nando's order in 10 seconds on WhatsApp
POV: You have a calorie tracker that actually knows SA food
My WhatsApp just told me I ate 3,000 calories today

contentPillars.name: SA Food Facts
contentPillars.description: Quick, shareable food facts that South Africans care about
examples: The healthiest order at every SA fast food chain
SA snacks ranked by calories (biltong vs droewors vs chips)
Your morning rusk habit is costing you THIS many calories

hookFormulas: Your [SA restaurant] order is hiding THIS many calories
I tracked every calorie at [place] and...
POV: Your WhatsApp knows more about nutrition than you
[SA food] vs [SA food] - which one is worse?
South Africans are eating THIS many calories without knowing
I asked WhatsApp to track my braai... the results were brutal
Stop ordering THIS at [restaurant] (here's what to get instead)
The 'healthy' option that's actually worse than a burger
ctaOptions: Track yours on WhatsApp - link in bio
FitSorted - WhatsApp calorie tracker - link in bio
No app needed. Just WhatsApp. Link in bio

calAI.strategy: Influencer marketing + organic TikTok showing calories in meals
calAI.contentType: Meal calorie reveals, before/after, slideshow carousels

kalo.strategy: Slideshows of meals with calorie counts overlaid

competitorInsights.gap: NOBODY is doing this for South African food. Zero competition in SA calorie content on TikTok.
